message:
feat(codegen): Add runtime call factory functions to mod_helper

Add reusable factory functions for generating common call patterns:
- runtimeCall: runtime.func_name(args...)
- runtimeCallWithAlloc: runtime.func_name(__global_allocator, args...)
- qualifiedCall: module.func_name(args...)
- qualifiedCallWithAlloc: module.func_name(__global_allocator, args...)

Part of DRY consolidation to reduce repetitive codegen patterns.
